name: Gamma Rising
description: The Dominion War has eclipsed the wonder and mystery of the Gamma Quadrant. However, a new effort to destabilize the Dominion and the Quadrant may bring about something far worse.
rules:
-- In a Voyage Event, you will engage in Voyages with ocassional Voyage Encounters that will test proficiencies of your voyage crew.
-- In this event, Gold and Silver skills for Voyages will be CMD and SEC. 
-- Voyage Encounters take place at the following points in time: 1 minute, 5 minutes, 15 minutes, 30 minutes, 45 minutes, 1 hour, 1.5 hours, 2 hours, and every 2 hours after that.
-- Passing a Voyage Encounter without losing any contests raises the multiplier for Victory Points gained in contests. Losing a contest resets this multiplier.
-- Three of the following traits are randomly chosen for each Encounter: Inspiring, Explorer, Scoundrel, Casual, Playful, Hero, Marksman, Investigator. Using crew with matching traits increases their Crit Chance in contests.
-- Using any version of Golin, Coutu, Falow, or Explorers will provide a bonus to antimatter and a permanent multiplier to passively gained Victory Points.
-- Using the Seleya, the Jem'Hadar Flagship, the Defiant-Class Ship, or ships with the Pioneer trait will provide a bonus to antimatter.
-- Earn Event Victory Points passively by running a voyage, and actively by winning contests during Voyage Encounters. The amount you earn increases with every Voyage Encounter passed. 
-- Collect Event Victory Points to unlock Threshold Rewards!
-- In this event, Squadrons may also compete to advance up the Squadron leaderboards. Join a Squadron to get more rewards!
bonus_text: Bonus: Pioneer (Ship trait), Golin, Coutu, Falow, Explorers

featured_crew.name: Hanson
featured_crew.flavor: Hanson stood strong against the Borg at Wolf 359, ultimately becoming a casualty himself.

action.name: The Truth Is, Hell, We Are Not Ready

featured_crew.name: Coutu
featured_crew.flavor: A Paradan rebel who managed to uncover a government plot against the rebel delegation at peace talks.

action.name: I Wonder Why He Was Coming Back

featured_crew.name: Elizabeth
featured_crew.flavor: Elizabeth took an assignment as the Lexington’s chief medical officer right after graduation, but sometimes regretted that she was not on Deep Space 9.

action.name: There Were Times I Regretted Not Taking Your Assignment.

rewards.name: Chronitons
rewards.flavor: Chronitons allow your crew to take action in these chaotic times. Use Chronitons to replay parts of past missions via the Timeline.

rewards.name: Rumpelstiltskin
rewards.flavor: Fairy-tale character who appeared on the ship to observe the unique phenomenon of imagination.

rewards.name: Elizabeth
rewards.flavor: Elizabeth took an assignment as the Lexington’s chief medical officer right after graduation, but sometimes regretted that she was not on Deep Space 9.

action.name: There Were Times I Regretted Not Taking Your Assignment.

rewards.name: Rarity
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 5 Polestars: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Super rare, Legendary

rewards.name: Skill
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 6 Polestars: Command, Diplomacy, Security, Engineering, Science, Medicine

rewards.name: ISM
rewards.flavor: ISM, or interstellar medium, is the matter that exists between astronomical objects. It can be manipulated by the Q to facilitate crew retrieval. ISM can be obtained from Daily Log-in Rewards, Campaigns and participating in Fleet activities.

rewards.name: Dilithium
rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.name: Honor
rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Merits
rewards.flavor: Merits can be earned by completing missions. Use Merits to acquire faction-based rewards, upgrades to your ship, and more.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

screens.text: "Our people have been punished over and over for the wrongs of the Nol-Ennis, forbidden even the release of death. Does this not violate the laws set forth by the Founders themselves? You cannot tell me they truly favor order when they permit such madness!"
"Indeed. It seems the Founders don't have the control they believe themselves to. And with rumblings of dissent, they may find themselves no longer at the top if they aren't careful."
"And where exactly are these rumblings of dissent coming from? I assure you, anyone who dares challenge the order within the Dominion will be dealt with swiftly."

"As you can see, Captain, the Dominion is enduring its own struggles, internally and externally. I have found the Gamma Quadrant a fascinating new home, but it is still marred by the damage the Dominion War caused. Could you please help us?"

"Our people have been punished over and over for the wrongs of the Nol-Ennis, forbidden even the release of death. Does this not violate the laws set forth by the Founders themselves? You cannot tell me they truly favor order when they permit such madness!"
"Indeed. It seems the Founders don't have the control they believe themselves to. And with rumblings of dissent, they may find themselves no longer at the top if they aren't careful."
"And where exactly are these rumblings of dissent coming from? I assure you, anyone who dares challenge the order within the Dominion will be dealt with swiftly."

"As you can see, Captain, the Dominion is enduring its own struggles, internally and externally. I have found the Gamma Quadrant a fascinating new home, but it is still marred by the damage the Dominion War caused. Could you please help us?"
